### ChangeHandler

Input 和 TextArea 值变更回调函数

```typescript
export type ChangeHandler<T extends HTMLTextAreaElement | HTMLInputElement> = (ref: T, event: React.ChangeEvent<T> | React.CompositionEvent<T> | React.MouseEvent<HTMLSpanElement, MouseEvent>, value: string, eventType: 'inputChange' | 'composition' | 'clear') => void;
```
